description: The key differences: Hermes writes and saves its own skills automatically as a core behavior (OpenClaw's skill system centers on a community marketplace); Hermes is more stable across updates (OpenClaw has documented release regressions and ClawHub has had security incidents involving malicious skills); and Hermes runs natively in the Python ecosystem.
title: hermes-webui — Hermes Agent Workspaces & GUIs | Hermes Atlas
